Snitch × Growster

How we built
a creative machine
for Snitch.

India's highest ad-spending menswear brand. 100 unique ads. Every single month. Zero creative fatigue.

Unique ads delivered

Creative fatigue incidents
01 — The Problem

Scale was there.
The creatives weren't.

Snitch runs one of the highest-velocity ad machines in Indian apparel. Budget? Unlimited. But creative fatigue was hitting every single week — UGC was cheap but unreliable, production was expensive, and neither was scalable at speed.

They needed a predictable system, not just content. A machine that could feed the algorithm faster than the algorithm could burn through creatives.

🔴
Creative Fatigue
Hitting every week
🟡
UGC Hit Rate
Terrible at scale
🔵
Production Cost
Too expensive to scale

02 — Our Analysis

Don't fix the ads.
Build the system.

A brand of this stature doesn't need a plug-and-play solution. We built a capability around their specific needs — a dedicated team, a proprietary process, and a system to produce 33 unique content pieces in ONE shoot day. Each meticulously crafted based on data. None repeated. Ever.

The shoot floor — live simulation
Set 01
Set 02
Set 03
0
Pieces shot
3
Sets running
1
Shoot day
33
Target pieces
3 Models
Each dedicated to one set — no cross-contamination, no delays
1 DOP per set
Dedicated Director of Photography ensuring quality at speed
33 pieces / day
Unique, data-driven creatives. Every single one different.
03 — The Data

We found the
exact breaking point.

Snitch was seeing frequency climb and CTR collapse — the classic symptoms of creative fatigue at scale. CPMs spiked. CPI went up. Media buying became inefficient. We reverse-engineered the algorithm and built a system to stay permanently ahead of the fatigue curve.

"The algorithm rewards freshness. We built a factory for it."
CTR
0.4% avg
↑ 2.1%+
After system launch
Cost per Install
Industry benchmark
↓ All-time low
Lowest ever recorded
Creative Frequency
Hitting 8+ (burnt)
↓ Managed & fresh
Never fatigued again
CPM Efficiency
Spiking with fatigue
↑ Consistently stable
Media buying unlocked
04 — The Solution

A creative engine
built for scale.

We didn't just make ads. We built Snitch's entire content production infrastructure — a system capable of producing high-quality, data-driven creatives faster than any algorithm could burn through them.

01
Data-driven briefs
Every shoot brief built from performance data — hooks, formats, and angles that the data said would win.
02
3-set shoot system
Parallel production across 3 dedicated sets, each running simultaneously with their own model, DOP, and camera.
03
33 pieces per shoot day
A proprietary production system that unlocked scale no agency had delivered before — at an affordable cost.
04
Continuous iteration loop
Every week, performance data fed back into the next shoot brief. The system got smarter with every cycle.
Growster × Snitch
The kind of content we deliver
05 — The Impact

Numbers that speak
louder than any pitch.

2000+
Unique ads delivered across the mandate
#1
Lowest Cost per App Install — all time
0
Creative fatigue incidents under our system
Beats
Account ROAS average — consistently, every month
